segments.text: Still, even at 3-3, PeranBox is maintaining the advantage, though...
segments.original_text: ただそれでも3-3、PeranBoxの方が優位に進めてはいるんですけれども

segments.text: In terms of resources, a_cola's side probably hasn't invested much yet, so...
segments.original_text: 資材状況がおそらくあcola側があまり鉄資材を使っていないので

full_text: Still, even at 3-3, PeranBox is maintaining the advantage, though... In terms of resources, a_cola's side probably hasn't invested much yet, so...
